title: Award Winning Business Keynote Speaker & World Class Magician Robert Strong
description: Corporate Keynote Speaker, Award-Winning Magician, and Bestselling Author Robert Strong Inspires Your Attendees To Create Magic in The World!

blocks.html: Robert Strong's Keynote Empowers Businesses to Achieve Magical Results.
Corporate Keynote Speaker, Award-Winning Magician, and Bestselling Author
See some of the Companies who trust Robert Strong to entertain their executives, teams, and customers:

Robert Strong’s Keynote Called “Creating Magic in the World” Empowers Your Audience to:

  • Create memorable experiences that connect people.

  • Get customers excited about your solutions.

  • Grab attention and deliver captivating presentations.

  • Develop a workplace culture that people love.

  • Craft amazing stories that delight.

Why is Robert Strong Silicon Valley's Best Keynote Speaker and Entertainer?

Robert's specialty is creating bespoke business keynotes and workshops that speak to the story of your organization and its culture.

He engages your guests with the best forms of communication that demand full attention: magic and humor. Studies have shown that when people are amazed, laughing, and having fun, they remember the content more accurately, remember it longer, and share it with more people.

Robert blends comedy, magic, and storytelling to teach practical lessons and strategies that your audience can immediately use. Also, Robert blends science-backed info, activities, and innovative mixed media.

Robert has a flawless 35+ year track record entertaining everyone from engineers and scientists to founders and CEOs, from sales and marketing to US presidents and other world leaders.

Robert’s book Amaze & Delight is a thoroughly researched and entertaining guide to improving executive presence, work culture, and customer experience.

Robert demonstrates how the secrets to his success as an entertainer and magician can become impactful business tools.

Drawing from an entire lifetime of captivating audiences, Amaze & Delight offers indispensable insights on how to create fun, memorable experiences for your coworkers and customers.

You’ll enjoy illuminating stories from Robert Strong’s & David Martinez’s careers in magic, comedy, and high tech. Learn transformative, practical advice that you can start implementing right away.
He has done 10 TEDx Talks, 2 TED Talks, and an appearance on the hit TV show Penn & Teller Fool Us.

Frequently Asked Questions for Keynote Speaker Robert Strong:

Who has Robert spoken to in the past?

Robert has worked with a variety of well-known companies and brands including Google, Amazon, Meta, LinkedIn, Stanford, Genentech, Kaiser Permanente, the Smithsonian, and Amazon. Robert is a sought-after keynote speaker for high-performing business leaders and companies with emerging technologies. He’s an expert at bringing together many different groups of people with his inspirational talks and his motivational team-building workshops.

How does Robert encourage audience engagement as an event speaker?

By getting to know each of his clients, Robert customizes every event to promote employee engagement. He gets everyone to participate in small groups through storytelling exercises and even teaches everyone a magic trick that they can do to make their next presentation amazing and memorable. Robert's charisma, public speaking skills, and expertise as a magician will amaze your audience and make your event a hit.

How do I hire Robert Strong for my event?

You can find Robert's contact information below! Send him an email with as much information about your event as possible, then schedule a call to review your event goals and your audience. Be sure to ask for a demo over Zoom for you and your team, and then Robert will send a proposal for you to consider.

What if Robert is unavailable or not the perfect fit for my event?

Robert knows he is not always the perfect fit for every event, so if you like working with him but want something a little different, let him know that, too. He has been a professional entertainer for almost four decades and knows all the best speakers, comedians, and magicians. He would happily find someone amazing and delightful from his roster to make your event a hit with your attendees.

Contact him now to discuss how to make your event spectacular!

items.title: Get in touch
items.body: info@strongentertainment.com for rates and availability. Please be sure to include the date, location, number of guests, and the occasion of your event.
